---
format: html
title: make_community_interpolation_jobs()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>make_community_interpolation_jobs</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Make Community Interpolation Jobs</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Splits paleo community and age-uncertainty data into independent
per-dataset interpolation jobs for dynamic targets branching.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>make_community_interpolation_jobs(data, data_age_uncertainty)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="data">data</code></td>
<td>
<p>A data frame containing a 'dataset_name' column and community data.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="data_age_uncertainty">data_age_uncertainty</code></td>
<td>
<p>A data frame containing a 'dataset_name' column and age-model data.
Datasets without matching uncertainty rows receive an empty tibble.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Details</h3>

<p>Each job is self-contained so a dynamic target branch only retrieves
one dataset instead of loading the complete continental inputs.
</p>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>A list of jobs. Each job contains 'data' and
'data_age_uncertainty' elements for one dataset.
</p>


<h3>See Also</h3>

<p>[interpolate_community_data_with_uncertainty()]
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
